---
title: "Poster"
subtitle: "VAST Challenge 2026 · Mini-Challenge 1"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
toc: false
---

Our project poster, in ISO A1 format at 300 dpi (7016 × 9933 px), covering the issues and problems, motivation, approach, results and future work.

[⬇ Download the poster (JPEG, A1, 300 dpi)](images/poster.jpg){.btn .btn-primary}

![Team HeeHaa project poster — Detecting Embargo Breach in a Multi-Agent AI Communication Network](images/poster.jpg)
